title: Rule-Obj-Class
description: JSON schema for creating or updating a Pega class definition (Rule-Obj-Class). Only authored and identity fields are included; system-managed fields are omitted.

pyClassName.description: The fully qualified class name being defined (e.g., 'MyOrg-MyApp-Work-MyCase').

pyLabel.description: Display label shown in Dev Studio class browser.

pyDescription.description: Human-readable description of the class purpose. Required — Validate blocks save when empty.

pyDerivesFrom.description: Parent class — the class this class derives from. Required for all classes except @baseclass. Must reference an existing class. Inspect a sibling class with get-rule (detail='full') to find the correct value for the application.

pyClassType.description: Class type. Required — Validate blocks save when empty. 'Concrete' for instantiable classes, 'Abstract' for base classes. Class names ending with '-' are forced to Abstract by the server.

pyClassGroup.description: The class group this class belongs to. Required for work subclasses — set to the root work class of the family (e.g., 'MyOrg-MyApp-Work').

pyClassGroupIndicator.description: Indicates whether this class has a class group assignment. 'HASCLASSGROUP' when pyClassGroup references another class, 'ISCLASSGROUP' when this class IS the class group root, 'NOCLASSGROUP' for data classes with no class group.

pyUsage.description: Brief usage note. Required — omitting causes save failure.

pyInitialVersion.description: Initial ruleset version. Always '01-01-01'. Auto-derived by the builder — agents should not set this.

pyPatternInheritance.description: Enable pattern inheritance for this class.

pyRuleSet.description: Ruleset to save into — typically the branch ruleset during development.

pyRuleSetVersion.description: Ruleset version. The Validate activity removes this field (BUG-702978), but the builder provides it. Inspect sibling classes to confirm the pattern.

pyCircumstanceProp.description: Property used for circumstancing (variant resolution). Blank for no circumstancing.

pyPreventSubClassing.description: When 'true', prevents other rulesets from creating subclasses of this class. Defaults to 'false'.

pyExcludeFromFTIndex.description: When 'true', excludes instances of this class from the full-text search index. Defaults to 'false'.

pyEncryptBLOB.description: When 'true', encrypts the BLOB column for instances of this class. Defaults to 'false'.

pyCreateDedicatedTable.description: When 'true', Pega creates a dedicated database table for instances of this class instead of storing them in a shared table.

pyFormType.description: Controls which form layout Dev Studio uses to display the class rule. 'Harness' for most data/work classes, 'Form' for some admin classes.

pyDisplayMode.description: Controls the rendering mode of the class rule form in Dev Studio.

pyReloadForm.description: When 'true', Dev Studio reloads the class form after saving.

pyHistoryObject.description: When 'true', enables history snapshot recording for instances of this class.

pyDecisioningBaseClassName.description: Base class name for decisioning framework classes. Auto-populated by the Decisioning framework — only applicable to decision-related classes.

pyAutogeneratedKey.description: When 'true', Pega auto-generates key values for instances of this class. Only meaningful for Concrete classes without HASCLASSGROUP — the Validate activity forces this to 'false' for Abstract classes and HASCLASSGROUP classes.

pyBaseRule.description: When 'true', marks this as a base rule in the ruleset stack.

pyOrgDivision.description: Organization division context for the class rule.

pyKeyDefList.description: Custom key definitions for concrete classes. Each entry defines a property that serves as a key column in the class's database table. Cleared automatically for abstract classes by Validate. Key properties must exist, must not be transient, and must not be pzInsKey, pxInsName, or pxObjClass.

pyKeyName.description: Property name to use as a key (e.g., 'pxBelongsToApplication').

pyKeyCaption.description: Display caption for the key (e.g., 'pzInsKey of Application').
